title: Thiourea and its Organic Derivatives. Part IV. Oxidimetric Determination with Chloramine-T
author: Balwant Singh
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Chloramine-T has been used as a redox reagent for visual and potentiometric determinations of thiourea and its several alkyl and aryl derivatives in sulphuric acid medium.
steps_raw: Chloramine-T has been used as a redox reagent for visual and potentiometric determinations of thiourea and its several alkyl and aryl derivatives in sulphuric acid medium.
